title: Wardelon's Illagers x Fresh Animations
description: A modified version of Wardelon's Illagers to support Fresh Animations.Now you can enjoy not only the beautiful textures of the illustrations, but also the pleasant animations.
body:
**EN:**
A modified version of Wardelon's Illagers, created to support Fresh Animations.Now you can enjoy not only the beautiful textures of the illustrations, but also the pleasant animations.

**RU:**
Измененная версия Wardelon's Illagers , созданная для поддержки Fresh Animations.Теперь вы сможете насладиться не только красивыми текстурами илладжеров,но и приятными анимациями
